feed.title: RemRemRemRe
feed.subtitle: Sharing something useful to the world :)

entry.title: A way to combine multiple unreal projects into one

link.title: A way to combine multiple unreal projects into one

entry.summary:
Use the GenerateProjectFiles.bat and .uprojectdirs files of the engine directory
First refer to the comments in the Default.uprojectdirs file Create a new my.uprojectdirs or directly modify the Default.uprojectdirs file and write to e.g. Project/ When you run GenerateProjectFiles.bat build a solution, you will additionally look for Unreal Project directories from the Level 1 subdirector...
